title: Vendored-skill manager: build `update-vendored-skills` (read skills/vendored.toml, re-fetch at pinned/latest ref, atomic replace, re-pin sha)
notes: Deferred from the code-review vendoring. Also evaluate the vercel-labs/agent-skills + `npx skill` model as a management/source option (it targets .codebuddy/skills = CodeBuddy runtime, sources from vercel-labs/agent-skills) and whether to support a CodeBuddy channel / source code-review from there. Goal: manageable + upgradable + ships-with-plugin.

title: Verification-method design bundle: comprehend -> measure -> serialize (root node + generative-gate, harness, phase-profiles, evidence-503, investigation-ledger, council-method, build/improvise/update)
notes: The main track. Worktree .worktrees/verification-method (branch verification-method, off slice1-foundation->main). Root node = the primitive + disciplines + fractal scales + per-phase instantiation (EXECUTE = satisfy-by-doer, no generation). NOT a single doc.

title: Wire code-review skill as a one-directional reference from uacp-propose / uacp-plan / uacp-execute (review methodology to apply at those phases)
notes: The optional wiring from the vendoring task (ADR-0017 one-directional reference boundary).

title: Phase B 'fuller' increments: inc3 per-kind schema validator/uacp-lint, inc4 uacp-fmt, inc5 entity-level writer API, inc6 entity-per-file migration
notes: Paused after the hybrid trust model (watermark + Guardian). The entity-writer (inc5) is the universal-write-path that lets artifact_integrity require a record for every mapped artifact (closes the net-new-file gap).

title: Lifecycle: create the isolated workspace at BRAINSTORM/TRIAGE (not PROPOSE)
notes: Surfaced while moving the worktree; the workspace should exist before PROPOSE so the LSP/code plane is live earlier.

title: Merge skills-integration -> main (vendor code-review at depth-2 + NOTICE-based lint exemption + gitignored symlink bridge + vendored.toml + TASKS.jsonl)
notes: Branch is green (suite 1739, ruff clean). Base slice1-foundation already merged to main via PR #1.

title: Unify entry points: build the single `uacp` CLI + generalize tool_specs into a command registry (CLI + MCP = two thin adapters); migrate all 12 scripts/*.py to `uacp <cmd>`
notes: DESIGN DONE (design/entrypoints/ bundle, 2 nodes). BUILD DEFERRED until after Phase C (uacp-lint/fmt from node 33 / D8 are the first folded commands). Pattern: one command registry + a per-command `class` (taxonomy + per-command map in design/entrypoints/00 §3 + 01 §1 — classed by MUTATION not dev-ness; migrations are operator-mutating → audit required) + a CLI adapter (cli.py via pyproject [project.scripts] uacp) mirroring the existing MCP adapter over tool_specs. Migrate the 12 scripts incrementally (lint first). Grounded: tool_specs.py IS the registry; the MCP server is already a thin adapter (call_tool->spec.handler).
